sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13889" key="a)po/streptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-στρεπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n13889.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turned back,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀποστραφείς</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.15B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.15B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> <sense n="2" id="n13889.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hostile, unacceptable,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epicur.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
